app.name: Bridge
app.tagline: A multilingual health companion for patients and caregivers.
auth.title: Sign in to your health workspace
auth.body: Track medicines, understand prescriptions, and get safety alerts in your preferred language.
auth.name: Full name
auth.errorUserExists: An account already exists with this email.
auth.errorGenericSignIn: Unable to sign in right now.
auth.errorGenericSignUp: Unable to create your account right now.
auth.inviteBanner: You are joining Bridge through a caregiver invite.
auth.inviteHint: This invite will be linked after you sign in.
onboarding.title: Choose the language Bridge should use for you
onboarding.body: Your preferred language is saved so results and alerts can be translated for you.
onboarding.chat.subtitle: Tell Bridge about yourself
onboarding.chat.error: Something went wrong. You can skip to finish setup.
onboarding.chat.kickoff: Please start my health profile setup in my selected language.
onboarding.chat.unavailable: The onboarding assistant is unavailable right now. Add your AI key and refresh, or skip to continue.
voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
voice.permissionDenied: Microphone access is blocked in this browser.
voice.micUnavailable: No microphone is available right now.
onboarding.medications.title: Add the medicines you want Bridge to track
onboarding.medications.body: Add each medicine once, choose the time of day you take it, and set how many days it should stay on your schedule.
onboarding.medications.name: Medicine name
settings.title: Edit your health profile
settings.body: Keep your language, health details, and medicine schedule up to date so Bridge stays useful.
settings.profile.title: Review what Bridge knows about you
settings.profile.body: Update the health details collected during onboarding so future analysis stays relevant.
settings.profile.helper: Use commas to separate multiple items.
settings.medicines.title: Edit tracked medicines and schedules
settings.medicines.body: Adjust names, dosage notes, daily times, duration, and whether a medicine stays active on your dashboard.
settings.reminders.title: Browser and PWA notifications
settings.reminders.body: Bridge uses local browser notifications for medicine reminders while the app or installed PWA is active.
settings.reminders.toggleBody: Turn local notification reminders on or off for this device.
settings.reminders.helper: Notification permission is requested separately on this device.
settings.quick.backBody: Return to your dashboard and today's medicine view.
settings.quick.scanBody: Analyze prescriptions, labels, meals, and menus.
settings.profile.notesPlaceholder: Any extra details Bridge should remember
settings.medicines.name: Medicine name
settings.medicines.activeToggle: Keep this medicine active on the home dashboard
settings.reminders.permissionReady: Notifications are ready on this device.
settings.reminders.permissionPrompt: Allow notifications to receive reminder alerts on this device.
settings.reminders.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked in this browser for Bridge.
settings.reminders.permissionUnsupported: Notifications are not supported on this device.
assistant.title: Ask Bridge anything
assistant.body: Get help with medicines, labels, meals, prescriptions, translations, and general health questions in your preferred language.
assistant.error: Bridge could not reply right now. Please try again.
assistant.empty: Ask about a medicine, upload result, food label, prescription, or text from another language. Bridge will respond only in your selected language.
home.title: Your Bridge dashboard
home.body: Your personal health workspace. Upload prescriptions, check medicine safety, and manage reminders.
home.quickScanBody: Understand prescriptions, medicine labels, meal photos, food package labels, and menus in one place.
home.signedInHint: Keep your profile private on shared devices.
home.todayDosesBody: Stay on top of upcoming medicines and quickly log each dose.
home.noDoses: No doses scheduled yet. Add medicines in onboarding or later from settings.
home.recentScansBody: Revisit the latest prescription, label, meal, and menu checks.
home.noScans: No scans yet. Use the scanner to understand a prescription, medicine label, meal, food label, or menu.
home.scanDialogBody: Choose a clear photo and Bridge will explain what it sees with a simple safety summary.
home.scanDesktopHint: JPG, PNG, or HEIC photos work best for prescriptions, labels, meals, and menus.
home.scanDropHint: Drag and drop an image here, or choose one from your computer.
home.onboardingPrompt: Complete onboarding to create your own Bridge assistance and tracking.
home.linkedProfilesBody: Open a linked profile to review medicines, stats, and scanned items.
home.linkedProfilesEmptyBody: Invite someone you trust so you can stay connected around medicines, scans, and profile updates.
home.linkedProfilesIncompleteBody: Complete onboarding first, then you can invite someone to your care network.
home.progressEmpty: Your weekly adherence will appear here after onboarding and medicine setup.
home.dosesSetupPrompt: Finish onboarding to set up your medicines and reminders.
home.scansSetupPrompt: Complete onboarding first, then scans you upload will appear here.
home.caregiverAccessBody: Copy a private join link to connect a family member or trusted person to your Bridge profile.
home.careNetworkBody: Keep everyone in one simple list so you can quickly see who can view you and whose profile you can open.
profile.incompleteBody: Onboarding is still in progress for this person. You can still review the profile shell and any details they have already added.
profile.noScans: No scans available for this profile yet.
settings.continueOnboardingBody: Finish your Bridge setup or add your own medicines later.
reminders.banner.readyBody: Bridge will surface upcoming local medicine reminders on this device while the app or PWA is active.
reminders.banner.deniedBody: Browser notifications are turned off for Bridge on this device. You can re-enable them in browser site settings.
reminders.banner.unsupportedBody: This browser does not support notification reminders. Bridge will still show upcoming doses in the app.
reminders.banner.defaultBody: Allow notifications to get local medicine reminder alerts on desktop and supported mobile PWAs.
scan.reviewing: Bridge is still reviewing this upload.
scan.retry: Try a clearer image if the result stays incomplete.
scan.processingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Keep this screen open while Bridge finishes the analysis.
